heading: Applicability of other statutory provisions
label: 2796c Applicability of other statutory provisions
text: Any reference to sales of defense articles under this chapter in any provision of law restricting the countries or organizations to which such sales may be made shall be deemed to include a reference to leases of defense articles under this subchapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 90–62982 Stat. 1321section 2751 of this titleOct. 22, 1968
